name: Sendspin
description: The `sendspin` component adds support for [Sendspin](https://www.sendspin-audio.com), a multi-room synchronized audio protocol. The hub manages the connection to a Sendspin server and distributes state updates to any Sendspin child components.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this hub. Required if you want to reference this hub explicitly from child components.

config_entries.label: Task Stack In PSRAM
config_entries.description: If `true`, the FreeRTOS playback task stack is allocated in PSRAM instead of internal RAM. Requires the [psram](https://esphome.io/components/psram/) component. Defaults to `false`.
